Hardware RTL Boundary

This section corresponds to the SoC-controlled RTL split between:

  • 2.soc/1.hw for SoC-specific wrappers and memory/controller RTL

  • 1.dsp/rtl for reusable DSP/math building blocks

The LiteX top-level design draws from both locations.
